pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 26 creates file at this exact path
setup_task.sh line 22 and export_result.sh line 8 reference this path
setup_task.sh line 23 and export_result.sh line 9 reference this path
verifier.py line 52 checks 'if actors >= 3' for full score
verifier.py line 63 checks 'if ucs >= 5' for full score
verifier.py lines 73-86 checks for both includes and extends; export_result.sh lines 129-132 parses XML for these relationships
export_result.sh line 139 checks for broader set of terms including all metadata-claimed terms plus 'cloud', 'arm', 'disarm'

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a synthetic IoT requirements document at /home/ga/Desktop/iot_requirements.txt. Users must create a UML Use Case diagram in draw.io and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/securehub_usecase.drawio with PNG export to /home/ga/Desktop/securehub_usecase.png. Diagram must contain minimum 3 actors, 5 use cases, a system boundary, <<include>> and <<extend>> relationships, and text content matching required terms (Homeowner, Guest, Emergency, Unlock, Camera, Panic, plus additional terms: Cloud, Arm, Disarm).
